title: Tocchi
description: A Hitori Gotoh totem! Cuteness in your offhand! Bocchi the rock.
body:
**DISCLAIMER I DO NOT OWN THE ART IN THIS PACK**

- A Bocchi the rock hitori gotoh totem.
- Cuteness in your offhand!
- A pack based off of the anime "Bocchi the rock" 
> A pack made by padnar
art not owned by me.
If you have any questions or want something changed, you can contact me @padnar on discord.
